name: MIDDLEBY Corp
summary: The Middleby Corporation designs, manufactures, markets, distributes, and services commercial foodservice equipment and food processing equipment. Products include conveyor ovens, fryers, refrigeration systems, beverage dispensing equipment, IoT solutions, and food processing machinery for protein and bakery products. The company operates through two segments: Commercial Foodservice Equipment Group and Food Processing Equipment Group, serving restaurants, institutions, and food processors worldwide through a portfolio of over 100 acquired brands.

products.name: Conveyor Ovens
products.description: Commercial cooking ovens used in quick-service and casual restaurants.

products.name: Combi-Ovens
products.description: Combination cooking ovens for commercial kitchen operations.

products.name: Fryers and Ultrafryers
products.description: Commercial deep frying equipment for foodservice operations.

products.name: Frozen Dessert Equipment
products.description: Soft serve ice cream and frozen dessert machines under Emery Thompson brand.

products.name: IoT Solutions and Universal Controllers
products.description: Integrated IoT platforms and universal controllers for restaurant operations and efficiency.

products.name: Powerhouse Dynamics
products.description: IoT solutions and controls development for commercial foodservice operations.

products.name: Spiral and Conveyor Belt Ovens
products.description: Continuous processing ovens for food processing bakery and protein operations.

products.name: Automated Thermal Processing Systems
products.description: Integrated thermal processing for food processing customers including protein and bakery.

products.name: Blast Chillers and Coldrooms
products.description: Commercial refrigeration and freezing equipment for foodservice and food processing.

products.name: Coffee and Beverage Dispensing Equipment
products.description: Commercial beverage dispensing systems including coffee and specialty drinks.

products.name: Tortilla and Chip Production Systems
products.description: JC Ford brand systems for chip and tortilla manufacturing operations.

products.name: Frigomeccanica Equipment
products.description: Equipment for drying, defrosting, fermentation, refrigeration and preservation in food processing.

products.name: Oka Extrusion and Molding Equipment
products.description: Industrial extrusion, molding, depositing and cutting equipment for bakery, confectionery and pet-food markets.
